hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, a single-bar close outside Bollinger Bands (20, 2.0) with RSI(7) extreme reverts to the middle band within 30 bars, producing positive expectancy when BB width is above its 30th percentile.

entry_rules.note: Single-bar trigger only. No multi-bar confirmation. Act on bar close, enter next bar open.

regime_filter.comment: Avoid dead-range chop; do NOT gate on ADX as well (too conjunctive).

exit_rules.tp: opposite Bollinger Band OR middle BB touch (whichever first)

session_filter.comment: Gold trades 23h; keep session filter OFF initially to guarantee signal flow. Add later if noise too high.
